questionHtml:
The diagram shows the human brain.

[Source: By charlyzon (Own work) [CC BY-SA 3.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0)], via Wikimedia Commons.]

List two functions of the structure labelled A.
markschemeHtml:
a. breathing «rate»

b. heart function

c. digestion/saliva production

d. swallowing reflex

e. coughing

f. vomiting

g. blood pressure

h. state of consciousness/sleep

Allow any two functions.

No ECF

[Max 2 Marks]
